author: mwm5945
text: OSS-124: Allow annotations to HPAs created from CRD

author: mwm5945
text:
Annotations allow for advanced scaling using external metrics from the Kube Metrics Adapter (KMA). For example, querying Prometheus to calculate a metric to scale on (i.e. Requests per second per pod). However, the KMA needs access to the Annotations of the HPA to add these metrics to the k8s metrics server for the HPA to use.

`annotations` should be added to the Seldon HPA spec here:

[seldon-core/operator/apis/machinelearning.seldon.io/v1/seldondeployment\_types.go](https://github.com/SeldonIO/seldon-core/blob/13762c055f1e9e146d7c1111fc5d5aefcbf56f42/operator/apis/machinelearning.seldon.io/v1/seldondeployment_types.go#L294)

Line 294
in
[13762c0](/SeldonIO/seldon-core/commit/13762c055f1e9e146d7c1111fc5d5aefcbf56f42)

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | MinReplicas \*int32 `json:"minReplicas,omitempty" protobuf:"int,1,opt,name=minReplicas"` |

Then the operator can simply copy these values into the k8s HPA spec here:

[seldon-core/operator/controllers/seldondeployment\_controller.go](https://github.com/SeldonIO/seldon-core/blob/13762c055f1e9e146d7c1111fc5d5aefcbf56f42/operator/controllers/seldondeployment_controller.go#L133)

Line 133
in
[13762c0](/SeldonIO/seldon-core/commit/13762c055f1e9e146d7c1111fc5d5aefcbf56f42)

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{ |
